# Common Instructions

- project flow: planing, tasking, tracking, etc. see [project flow](../../docs/project-flow.md)
- architecture: see [architecture](../../docs/architecture.md)
- project CLI: build, run, check, etc. see `just` [cli](../../docs/development/cli.md)
- code standards: see [code standards](../../docs/development/code-standards.md)
- containers, environment variables, troubleshooting: see [development](../../docs/development.md)
- git flow: branching, PR, code review, address code review comments see [git flow](../../docs/development/git-flow.md)
- release: see [releases](../../docs/release.md)
